# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud network security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_network_security

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01"
    name: "[parameters('nsgName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      securityRules:
        - name: "Allow-RDP"
          properties:
            priority: 100
            protocol: "Tcp"
            access: "Allow"
            direction: "Inbound"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
            destinationPortRange: "3389"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: "Allow-SSH"
          properties:
            priority: 110
            protocol: "Tcp"
            access: "Allow"
            direction: "Inbound"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
            destinationPortRange: "22"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: "Allow-HTTP"
          properties:
            priority: 120
            protocol: "Tcp"
            access: "Allow"
            direction: "Inbound"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
            destinationPortRange: "80"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
        - name: "Allow-HTTPS"
          properties:
            priority: 130
            protocol: "Tcp"
            access: "Allow"
            direction: "Inbound"
            sourceAddressPrefix: "0.0.0.0/0"
            destinationPortRange: "443"
            sourcePortRange: "*"
            destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
parameters:
  nsgName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Name of the Network Security Group"
  location:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Location for the Network Security Group"
